home.badge: Ubukerarugendo Bwiza bwa AR na QR
home.title: Inzu Ndangamurage ya Kandt: Umurage Ukoreshwa na Tekinoloji ku Bashyitsi ba None
home.subtitle: Abashyitsi b'ubu bakuriye mu gihe cya ekarani, bareba videwo, kandi bakorana n'ibikoresho bya digitale buri munsi; nyamara iyo binjiye mu nzu ndangamurage, bahabwa urupapuro rwanditsweho n'ikimenyetso kidahinduka. Duhuza icyo cyuho n'uburyo bwa AR QR ku Nzu Ndangamurage ya Kandt.
home.webArDesc: Soma kode za QR ku kibanza kugira ngo ufungure ibintu birambuye, imishinga ya 3D, n'inkuru zivugwa.
home.accessibleDesc: Yakozwe nk'umuti wa Web-AR, uburambe bukora mu mushakisha nta gukurura porogaramu bisabwa.
home.digitalDesc: Sisitemu ihindura kode za QR ku kibanza mu burambe bw'inkuru zikoreshwa n'abashyitsi b'urubyiruko n'abakozi b'inzu ndangamurage.
home.exploreSubtitle: Ibyo ukeneye byose ku rugendo rwawe, ahantu hamwe
home.linkTrail: Kurikira urugendo rwa Richard Kandt mu mateka
home.linkScanner: Fata ifoto kugira ngo umenye kandi wumve ibikoresho
home.linkMap: Genzura ibyumba kandi ubone ibigaragazwa ku ishusho
home.linkGuides: Menya abayobozi bacu b'inzobere kandi usabe urugendo
home.linkFeedback: Sangiza uburambe bwawe kandi udufashe kunoza
home.researchDesc: Byatejwe imbere hakoreshejwe ubushakashatsi bw'ubumenyi bwo gushushanya n'isuzuma ry'uburyo butandukanye, iyi solution ni nziza, ihendutse, kandi irashobora gukura.
exhibits.title: Ibigaragazwa bya Taksonomiya
exhibits.subtitle: Shakisha ikusanyirizo ry'ibimera n'inyamaswa z'inzu ndangamurage
exhibits.noResults: Nta bigaragazwa bibonetse bijyanye n'ubushakashatsi bwawe.
trail.title: Inzira ya Richard Kandt
trail.intro: Richard Kandt (1867–1918) — Umushakashatsi n'umuganga w'Umudage. Yabaye Umunyawuropa wa mbere washakishije umupaka wa Nili-Congo nyuma akaba umuturage wa mbere w'igikoloni mu Rwanda. Kurikira amateka hano hasi kugira ngo umenye urugendo rwe n'umurage we.
scanner.title: Soma Kode QR y'Ikigaragazwa
scanner.subtitle: Erekeza kamera yawe kuri kode QR ku kigaragazwa icyo ari cyo cyose kugira ngo wige byinshi
scanner.invalidQr: Kode QR ntiyerekeza ku kigaragazwa. Gerageza indi kode.

booking.submittedMsg: Icyifuzo cyawe cy'urugendo cyakiriwe. Inzu ndangamurage izakomeza kwemeza urugendo rwawe vuba.

survey.subtitle: Tubwire ibyo wabonye mu Nzu Ndangamurage ya Kandt
survey.name: Amazina Yawe (ntibisabwa)
survey.duration: Urugendo rwawe rwamaze igihe kingana iki?
survey.recommend: Nashishikariza abandi gusura iri nzu ndangamurage
survey.commentsPlaceholder: Iki ni iki cyakushimishije cyane? Hari icyo watugira inama?
survey.thanksMsg: Ibitekerezo byawe bidufasha kunoza uburambe bw'inzu ndangamurage ku bashyitsi bose.

map.noRooms: Nta byumba bishyizweho. Umuyobozi ashobora kongeramo ibyumba kugira ngo yubake ishusho.
map.clickRoom: Kanda ku cyumba ku ikarita kugira ngo ubone ibigaragazwa byacyo

home.aboutText: Inzu Ndangamurage ya Kandt, iri i Kigali mu Rwanda, iri mu nzu yahoze ari iy'umuganga Richard Kandt — umutegetsi wa mbere w'Abadage mu Rwanda. Ubu ikora nk'inzu ndangamurage y'amateka kamere igaragaza ubudasa bw'ibinyabuzima bya Rwanda, umurage w'isi, n'inkuru y'uko Kigali yashinzwe. Inzu ndangamurage ibika ikusanyirizo ry'inyamaswa, ibimera, amabuye y'agaciro, n'ibikoresho by'amateka bivuga inkuru y'ihindagurika ry'umuco n'ibidukikije bya Rwanda.
home.historyText: Yubatswe mu ntangiriro z'ikinyejana cya 20, inzu ihagaze nk'imwe mu nyubako za kera z'igihe cy'abakoloni i Kigali. Nyuma y'ubwigenge, yahinduwe ikaba ahantu ho kubika umurage kamere wa Rwanda. Ubu inzu ndangamurage irimo amamurikiro akoreshwa na AR azana amateka mu buzima ku bashyitsi b'ubu.
home.visitAdmission: Ikiguzi: Ubuntu ku banyeshuri, 3,000 RWF ku bakuze
